user_message: Before my call with Consolidated Messenger, triage this.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 12:35 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-05 12:38 EST
Subject: URGENT: territory planning Issue at Consolidated Messenger

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 14:01 EST
Subject: Re: territory planning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Consolidated Messenger
Date: 2024-03-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Kevin (Consolidated Messenger)

[00:02:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on territory planning from our last session.

[00:07:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:10:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:19:00] Kevin (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:22:00] Kevin (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

[00:24:00] Kevin (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:29:00] Kevin (Consolidated Messenger): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Consolidated Messenger: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Stakeholder Map Generation template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
